arts.ttl: Fan Gallery: Season-high crowd cheer on Reading victory over Wycombe Wanderers
arts.sum: A season-high crowd of over 15,000 basked in the mid-afternoon sunshine on Saturday and were treated to a 1-0 win for Reading over neighbours Wycombe Wanderers. The Chairboys sit in third but dropped crucial points in the race for automatic promotion after Harvey Knibbs converted a penalty with 15 minutes remaining to seal victory for the hosts. While Noel Hunt's side remain seventh with only a handful of matches remaining, the Royals sit just a point outside the play-offs. Take a look at our fan gallery from the memorable afternoon below, with pictures courtesy of JasonPIX.

arts.ttl: Preview: Shrewsbury Town vs. Reading - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League One clash between Shrewsbury Town and Reading, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
